title: geranium cinereum var. obtusilobum
intro: Geranium cinereum var. obtusilobum is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb that belongs to the geranium family, known for its delicate white or pink flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it beneficial for skin and wound healing. The medicinal properties of Geranium cinereum var. obtusilobum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, anxiety, and menstrual cramps, and it is also said to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Geranium cinereum var. obtusilobum can be prepared in various forms, including tea, tincture, and salve, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
